notes: Canonical basic-turn for mistral-vibe: one user prompt, one text-only assistant reply, no tool use, asserting the ready→working→ready arc with TotalTokens>0. Single-birth adapter (session id = the session_<...> transcript directory, sessionIDFromPath), modeled like claudecode/kiro-cli — birth anchored to start, unpinned. Tokens are observable (sidecar stats.context_tokens → turn_done TokenSnapshot); cost is NOT (parser never reads stats.session_cost; mistral-vibe absent from core/pkg/capacity), so cost_nonzero=false while the model NAME still displays. Model mistral-medium-3.5 confirmed from live config.active_model. PROVISIONAL on emission: whether a proc-<PID> presession row precedes the session_<...> birth is not confirmable from source — record settles it. Recipe needs wait_turn, which the scaffolded driver stubs (driver=gap:wait_turn); record ports SEAMs 1/2/3 before driving.

text: session_<...> session born in ready when the transcript directory appears (single-birth; id from the transcript directory)
vibe PID bound to the session (matched by cwd)
Text-only assistant reply (turn_done) → ready; turn_done carries Tokens.Total>0
